heading: Authorizations of appropriations

children.label: B
children.text: Of the amount authorized under subparagraph (A)(i), $25,570,000 shall be for environmental compliance and restoration.

children.label: C
children.text: Of the amount authorized under clause (ii) of subparagraph (A), $26,848,500 shall be for environmental compliance and restoration.
